name: open-gstack-browser
tagline: Launches a specialized Chromium browser with an AI-controlled sidebar extension for real-time interaction and task execution.
verdict: This skill launches a specialized browser for AI interaction, providing real-time visibility into actions. It includes robust setup and verification steps, and guides the user through using the browser's features. The skill is well-structured with clear instructions and handles potential failure paths. It also includes extensive telemetry and configuration o

highlights.summary: Downloads a bun install script and pipes it to bash without review.
The skill does not explicitly state when NOT to use it.
SKILL.md is quite long (500+ lines) with many detailed sections that could potentially be split into reference files.
